# Do not edit manually. Goods tokens expand to static per-good map names.

modeu5_decay_stock_good_slaves_goods = { modeu5_decay_stock_for_good = { good = slaves_goods } }
modeu5_decay_stock_default_good_slaves_goods = { modeu5_decay_stock = { country = scope:modeu5_default_decay_country market = scope:modeu5_default_decay_market good = slaves_goods decay_rate = modeu5_default_monthly_decay_rate } }
